hero.heading: I build reliable backend systems for enterprise and cloud.
hero.intro: Backend-focused software engineer with 6+ years of experience — enterprise systems, Spring Boot microservices, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure). Currently working on infrastructure in the telecom and public safety domain at Teleste.

paths.description: Spring Boot and backend engineering for client work — see what I offer and start a conversation.

highlights.text: Faster response times from 8+ Spring Boot microservices built for real-time network monitoring and fault management at Nokia.
Test coverage raised with 150+ unit and integration tests — catching 25+ critical bugs before production.
Startup performance improvement from non-blocking microservices built with Spring WebFlux and Reactor at Confiz.
